message:
feat: Add precompiled module objects (.o) for ultra-fast linking

Add `metal0 build-objects` command that precompiles all runtime modules
to individual .o files, mirroring the source folder structure:

  .metal0/obj/src/utils/hashmap_helper.o
  .metal0/obj/packages/runtime/src/runtime.o
  .metal0/obj/packages/bigint/src/bigint.o
  etc.

Key changes:
- incremental.zig: MODULE_OBJECTS array with src/obj paths, transitive
  dependency resolution, buildModuleObjectNew(), compileWithPrecompiledObjects()
- build_commands.zig: cmdBuildObjects() command
- cli.zig: Register build-objects command

How it works:
1. Run `metal0 build-objects` once to precompile all modules
2. Future builds link against .o files instead of recompiling
3. Objects cached until source changes

Expected performance:
  Cold: ~60s (build all .o files once)
  Warm: <1s (just linking)
  Per-build: ~0.3s (vs 2-3s full compile)
